text: Audit docs for command and recovery consistency

Best use of this ticket is probably after the next round of UX work (especially T-81, T-77, T-80, and T-82) and informed by T-41. Otherwise the docs risk getting polished twice: once now, and again after behavior settles.
Related docs/behavior issue: see T-86 for the inconsistency between new and update label parsing. When this is fixed, the help text and examples should be aligned across label-taking commands.
Copilot's timing is right: do this after T-86, T-77, T-80, and T-82 settle. Otherwise docs get polished twice. Also: after T-41 bootstrap trial, which may reveal doc gaps.
if T-88 isn't done yet, do them together
